reportTeams.heading: My report teams
reportTeams.subheading: Teams are tied to a report draft. Ask the coordinator to assign you to a team, or request to join an existing one.
reportTeams.mockBanner: Front-end mockup — data and requests are simulated until the Nest API is available.

validity.hint: A report team is valid when it has at least one hunter, one quality checker, and one mentor.

myTeams.title: Teams I belong to
myTeams.empty: You are not assigned to any report team yet.

enroll.title: Request assignment to a report team
enroll.description: Your name, user id, and role are sent to the coordinator. They will include you when creating a new team.
enroll.success: Enrollment request sent to the coordinator.
enroll.alreadyPending: You already have a pending enrollment request.
enroll.errorGeneric: Could not send the enrollment request.

askJoin.title: Request to join a team
askJoin.description: Pick the report team (created by the coordinator). They will approve or decline your request.
askJoin.noTeamsAvailable: No teams available yet. The coordinator must create a team for a report draft first.

admin.heading: Report teams — administration
admin.subheading: Super admin: view, edit, and delete any team. Day-to-day assignments remain with the coordinator.

coordinator.heading: Coordination — report teams
coordinator.subheading: Approve assignment requests and manage team composition.
coordinator.applicantsDescription: Check people to include in a new team. You can spread candidates across several teams.

create.title: Create a report team
create.description: A report draft is created automatically. The team must include one hunter, one quality checker, and one mentor.
